interests.title: Tree-ring Stable Isotope
interests.description: Developing δ<sup>18</sup>O chronologies from tree rings for high-resolution paleoclimate reconstruction in East Asia.

interests.title: Cultural Heritage Science & Archaeology
interests.description: Dating historical wooden structures and excavated artifacts using dendrochronological and radiocarbon methods.

interests.title: Dendroclimatology
interests.description: Reconstructing past climate variability from tree-ring width and stable isotope proxies.

interests.title: Paleoclimatology
interests.description: Understanding long-term climate change and human-environment interactions using multi-proxy approaches.

interests.title: Hydroclimate Reconstruction in East Asia
interests.description: Detecting past changes in precipitation and drought patterns using tree-ring oxygen isotopes across East Asia.
